'''hothanaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:quadracial|quadracial]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-th-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quadracial|quadracial]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| hothanaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hothanithi|hothanithi]] || [[word:hothaniji|hothaniji]] || [[word:hothanishi|hothanishi]] || [[word:hothaniki|hothaniki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hothanuthuthu|hothanuthuthu]] || [[word:hothanujuju|hothanujuju]] || [[word:hothanushushu|hothanushushu]] || [[word:hothanukuku|hothanukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hothanuthu|hothanuthu]] || [[word:hothanuju|hothanuju]] || [[word:hothanushu|hothanushu]] || [[word:hothanuku|hothanuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hothanufthuf|hothanufthuf]] || [[word:hothanufjuf|hothanufjuf]] || [[word:hothanufshuf|hothanufshuf]] || [[word:hothanufkuf|hothanufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hothanethe|hothanethe]] || [[word:hothaneje|hothaneje]] || [[word:hothaneshe|hothaneshe]] || [[word:hothaneke|hothaneke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hothanothotho|hothanothotho]] || [[word:hothanojojo|hothanojojo]] || [[word:hothanoshosho|hothanoshosho]] || [[word:hothanokoko|hothanokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hothanotho|hothanotho]] || [[word:hothanojo|hothanojo]] || [[word:hothanosho|hothanosho]] || [[word:hothanoko|hothanoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hothanofthof|hothanofthof]] || [[word:hothanofjof|hothanofjof]] || [[word:hothanofshof|hothanofshof]] || [[word:hothanofkof|hothanofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:hothanïfthïf|hothanïfthïf]] || [[word:hothanïfjïf|hothanïfjïf]] || [[word:hothanïfshïf|hothanïfshïf]] || [[word:hothanïfkïf|hothanïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:hothanïfthïfthïf|hothanïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:hothanïfjïfjïf|hothanïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:hothanïfshïfshïf|hothanïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:hothanïfkïfkïf|hothanïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:hothanïfthïf|hothanïfthïf]] || [[word:hothanïfjïf|hothanïfjïf]] || [[word:hothanïfshïf|hothanïfshïf]] || [[word:hothanïfkïf|hothanïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:hothanïfthïf|hothanïfthïf]] || [[word:hothanïfjïf|hothanïfjïf]] || [[word:hothanïfshïf|hothanïfshïf]] || [[word:hothanïfkïf|hothanïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hothanæthæ|hothanæthæ]] || [[word:hothanæjæ|hothanæjæ]] || [[word:hothanæshæ|hothanæshæ]] || [[word:hothanækæ|hothanækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hothanathatha|hothanathatha]] || [[word:hothanajaja|hothanajaja]] || [[word:hothanashasha|hothanashasha]] || [[word:hothanakaka|hothanakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hothanatha|hothanatha]] || [[word:hothanaja|hothanaja]] || [[word:hothanasha|hothanasha]] || [[word:hothanaka|hothanaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hothanafthaf|hothanafthaf]] || [[word:hothanafjaf|hothanafjaf]] || [[word:hothanafshaf|hothanafshaf]] || [[word:hothanafkaf|hothanafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:hothanasha|hothanasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:hothanshësha|hothanshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hothanrosha|hothanrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hothanmusha|hothanmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:hothanyasha|hothanyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohothankshësha|gohothankshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohothankrosha|gohothankrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohothankmusha|gohothankmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohothankyasha|gohothankyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:hothathanasha|hothathanasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hothathanshësha|hothathanshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hothathanrosha|hothathanrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hothathanmusha|hothathanmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hothathanyasha|hothathanyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohothathankshësha|gohothathankshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohothathankrosha|gohothathankrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohothathankmusha|gohothathankmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohothathankyasha|gohothathankyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:hethænasha|hethænasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hethænshësha|hethænshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hethænrosha|hethænrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hethænmusha|hethænmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hethænyasha|hethænyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohethænkshësha|gohethænkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohethænkrosha|gohethænkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohethænkmusha|gohethænkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohethænkyasha|gohethænkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:hothfanasha|hothfanasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hothfanshësha|hothfanshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hothfanrosha|hothfanrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hothfanmusha|hothfanmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hothfanyasha|hothfanyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohothfankshësha|gohothfankshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohothfankrosha|gohothfankrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohothfankmusha|gohothfankmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohothfankyasha|gohothfankyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
